---
name: Safety Issue
about: Report a safety concern in the Trading Research Platform
title: '[SAFETY] '
labels: safety
assignees: ''
---

⚠️ **For security vulnerabilities, see SECURITY.md for responsible disclosure.**

## Safety Concern

Description of the safety concern.

## Forbidden Operation Check

- [ ] Does this concern involve live trading?
- [ ] Does this concern involve broker execution?
- [ ] Does this concern involve order placement?
- [ ] Does this concern involve automatic deployment?
- [ ] Does this concern involve production modification?
- [ ] Does this concern involve governance bypass?
- [ ] Does this concern involve evaluation bypass?

## Current Enforcement

How is this operation currently enforced? (RuntimeError, etc.)

## Bypass Potential

Could this safety concern allow a forbidden operation to execute without RuntimeError?

## Impact Assessment

What would happen if this safety concern were exploited?

## Suggested Fix

How should this be addressed?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
